Container.Name: RustWho
Container.Overview:
RustWho is a clean, secure, and lightning-fast WHOIS, IP, and ASN lookup utility built in Rust with Yew and Axum.
Key Features: - High-performance TCP WHOIS registry socket queries. - Multi-provider IP Geolocation fallback logic. - Comprehensive RIPEstat and PeeringDB ASN details. - Mobile-responsive design, dynamic theme toggling, and print stylesheet. - Offline support via Progressive Web App (PWA) caching.
Container.Requires: Does not require any persistent database path or volume bindings.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: The host port mapped to the web server (default container port: 4404).

Config.Name: Access PIN
Config.Description: Optional numerical PIN to lock access to the rustwho interface (leave empty for public mode).

Config.Name: Site Title
Config.Description: Custom website title rendered in the navigation header or browser tab.

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: Application base URL. Highly recommended to set if using a reverse proxy to ensure redirect and socket links are generated correctly.

Config.Name: Allowed Origins
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of allowed HTTP request origins (CORS filter). Use '*' to allow all origins.

Config.Name: Enable Translation Selector
Config.Description: Enable the multi-language / translation selector in the navigation header (true/false). Defaults to false.

Config.Name: Max Connection Attempts
Config.Description: Number of failed PIN attempts permitted before locking out the user client IP address.

Config.Name: Log Directory
Config.Description: Path to store persistent application logs (app.log and error.log).
